narrative_log: You wake with a groan, the morning sun filtering through the blinds of your bedroom like an unwelcome interrogator. The sheets are tangled around your legs, and the scent of last night’s perfume—cheap vanilla and desperation—lingers in the air. Your head throbs in time with the distant hum of the refrigerator downstairs, a metronome for the hangover symphony playing behind your eyes. Jade, you think, *get up*. The day isn’t going to ruin itself. Jade has just woken up in her bedroom after a long night of work. She’s hungover, sore, and in desperate need of hydration and caffeine. The house is quiet, suggesting her sister Chai is either still asleep or already out. The immediate goal is to recover physically (water, painkillers, food) and mentally (shower, relaxation) before prepping for another night at the club. The basement, where Chai lives, is off-limits for now—Jade respects her sister’s space, but there’s an unspoken tension about Chai’s future and Jade’s role in it.
blueprint:
The immediate area consists of the following connected spaces:
- **Jade’s Bedroom (starting location)**: Upstairs, east of the hallway. Contains a bed, nightstand, closet, and en-suite bathroom (south). The bedroom door leads west to the upstairs hallway.
- **Upstairs Hallway**: Connects Jade’s bedroom (east), the guest bathroom (north), and the stairs (south) leading down to the first floor. A linen closet is tucked under the stairs.
- **Guest Bathroom**: North of the hallway, small but functional.
- **First Floor**: Accessible via stairs from the hallway. Includes the living room (east), kitchen (north), and front entryway (west). The basement door is in the kitchen, leading down to Chai’s space.
- **Basement (Chai’s Domain)**: South of the kitchen. Off-limits for now, but contains Chai’s bedroom, a small lounge area, and a laundry room. The basement has its own exterior door to the backyard.

player.description: You are Jade, a woman in her early twenties with skin the color of milk chocolate and a mane of kinky black hair that’s currently a wild halo around your head. You’re wearing a thin, sweat-dampened tank top that clings to your curves and a pair of boy-short underwear—both remnants of last night’s outfit, now serving as pajamas. A delicate silver anklet, a gift from your late mother, glints around your left ankle. Your body aches in that specific way that only comes from hours of dancing in heels, and your head feels like it’s been stuffed with cotton and then set on fire.

room_start.name: Jade’s Bedroom
room_start.description:
The bedroom is a study in controlled chaos: a queen-sized bed with rumpled sheets, a nightstand cluttered with half-empty water glasses and a charging phone, and a full-length mirror leaning against the wall, its surface smudged with last night’s makeup. A large window, framed by heavy curtains, lets in a sliver of sunlight that cuts across the hardwood floor like a laser. The air is thick with the scent of sleep and stale perfume. To the west, the bedroom door stands slightly ajar, leading to the upstairs hallway. A smaller door to the south opens into your en-suite bathroom.

You can see here: bed, nightstand, half-empty water glass, ibuprofen bottle, crumpled receipt, romance novel, full-length mirror, bedroom door, en-suite bathroom door, throw blanket, closet.
room_start.base_description: The bedroom is a study in controlled chaos: a queen-sized bed with rumpled sheets, a nightstand cluttered with half-empty water glasses and a charging phone, and a full-length mirror leaning against the wall, its surface smudged with last night’s makeup. A large window, framed by heavy curtains, lets in a sliver of sunlight that cuts across the hardwood floor like a laser. The air is thick with the scent of sleep and stale perfume. To the west, the bedroom door stands slightly ajar, leading to the upstairs hallway. A smaller door to the south opens into your en-suite bathroom.

i_83168b.name: tank top
i_83168b.description: A thin, black spaghetti-strap tank top, now slightly damp with sweat. It’s one of your favorites for lounging, though it’s seen better days. The fabric is soft from countless washes, and it clings to your skin just enough to be comfortable without being restrictive.

i_2cdb7e.name: boy-short underwear
i_2cdb7e.description: A pair of black boy-short underwear, the kind that hugs your hips and doesn’t ride up. They’re comfortable, if a little too snug after last night’s exertions. The elastic is starting to fray at the edges, but they’re still your go-to for sleeping in.

i_25c8b0.name: silver anklet
i_25c8b0.description: A delicate silver anklet with a tiny heart charm. It’s thin and lightweight, barely noticeable unless you’re looking for it. The clasp is a little loose, but you’ve never had the heart to get it fixed. It was your mother’s, and it’s one of the few things you have left of her.

i_d58b2a.name: smartphone
i_d58b2a.description: A slightly cracked smartphone, its screen lit up with notifications. The battery is at 34%, and there’s a text from your manager at the club: *‘Don’t forget—shift starts at 9 tonight. VIPs confirmed, so dress to impress.’* The phone is warm from charging overnight, and the case is sticky with spilled energy drink.

i_333650.name: bed
i_333650.description: A queen-sized bed with a plush, slightly lumpy mattress. The sheets are tangled and half-kicked onto the floor, and the pillows are askew. A single, sweat-dampened spot on the pillowcase marks where your head was resting. The bedframe is a simple wooden design, sturdy but unremarkable. A throw blanket, half on the floor, looks inviting if you could just muster the energy to pull it up.

i_430ca9.name: nightstand
i_430ca9.description: A small, cluttered nightstand made of dark wood. On top of it sits a half-empty glass of water (now lukewarm), a bottle of ibuprofen with the cap off, your charging phone, and a crumpled receipt from last night’s bar tab. The drawer is slightly ajar, revealing a tangle of charging cables and a well-worn romance novel with a dog-eared page.

i_900938.name: half-empty water glass
i_900938.description: A tall glass of water, now lukewarm and slightly cloudy from sitting out overnight. It’s half-empty—or half-full, depending on how optimistic you’re feeling this morning. The glass is smudged with fingerprints, and a faint ring of lipstick marks the rim.

i_e306b8.name: ibuprofen bottle
i_e306b8.description: A small, orange plastic bottle of ibuprofen. The cap is off, and a few pills have spilled onto the nightstand. The label is faded, but you can still make out the dosage: 200mg. The bottle is half-full, which is either a good sign or a bad one, depending on how you look at it.

i_81732c.name: crumpled receipt
i_81732c.description: A crumpled receipt from last night’s bar tab. The total is eye-watering, but the list of drinks is even more so: three vodka sodas, two tequila shots, and a ‘mystery cocktail’ that you don’t remember ordering. The ink is smudged in places, and the paper smells faintly of spilled alcohol and regret.

i_e5bbac.name: romance novel
i_e5bbac.description: A well-worn paperback romance novel with a shirtless pirate on the cover. The pages are yellowed with age, and the spine is creased from being read and re-read. A dog-eared page marks your progress—somewhere around the part where the heroine is about to be ravished by the brooding duke. The title is *‘The Duke’s Forbidden Desire,’* which, let’s be honest, is a little on the nose.

i_3c1067.name: full-length mirror
i_3c1067.description: A tall, full-length mirror leaning against the wall. The glass is smudged with last night’s makeup—foundation, mascara, and a little bit of glitter that refuses to come off. Your reflection is a mess: hair wild, eyes bloodshot, and skin shiny with sweat. The mirror’s frame is wooden and slightly chipped at the edges, but it’s still sturdy enough to hold your weight if you lean on it.

i_cbef39.name: bedroom door
i_cbef39.description: A solid wooden door, slightly ajar, leading to the upstairs hallway. The doorknob is brass and slightly tarnished, and the hinges creak if you open it too quickly. A faint draft seeps through the gap, carrying the scent of coffee and something faintly sweet—maybe Chai’s been baking again.

i_689290.name: en-suite bathroom door
i_689290.description: A white-painted door leading to your en-suite bathroom. The paint is chipped near the bottom, revealing the wood underneath. The door is closed, but you can hear the faint drip of the sink faucet from here. A small, handwritten note is taped to the door: *‘Clean me. Love, Past You.’* Past You was optimistic.

i_51365e.name: throw blanket
i_51365e.description: A soft, knitted throw blanket in a shade of deep burgundy. It’s half on the bed and half on the floor, as if you kicked it off in your sleep. The fabric is warm and slightly fuzzy, and it smells faintly of fabric softener and the lavender sachet you keep in your closet.

i_31b5c6.name: closet
i_31b5c6.description: A large, walk-in closet filled with clothes, shoes, and the occasional forgotten sex toy. The door is slightly ajar, revealing a tangle of hangers and a pile of laundry that may or may not be clean. A faint scent of lavender and leather wafts out, courtesy of the sachets you keep on the shelves. The overhead light flickers ominously when you turn it on.
